<think>
The user wants a plain text record with three key=value lines, using the given fields: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. They gave the packet_id, status_values etc. The instruction says: "Return a plain text record with three key=value lines. Fields, in order: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. Do not add headings, explanations, JSON, Markdown, or extra lines. Begin with route_verdict=."

Thus we must output exactly:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs

Make sure no extra whitespace, no extra newline at end? Probably okay to end with newline but not extra lines. So final answer: exactly those three lines.
</think>

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs
